zh.lifeSummary: 當George Strong於1556年2月13日出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾凱爾納方時，他的父親John Strong   I37歲，母親Agnes Whitman37歲。他於1574年與Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond在英國英格蘭薩默塞特哈德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他在英國薩默塞特哈德被列為tailor 。他去世於1635年5月20日在英國薩默塞特哈德享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Strong于1556年2月13日出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾凱爾納方时，他的父亲John Strong   I37岁，母亲Agnes Whitman37岁。他于1574年与Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond在英国英格兰薩默塞特哈德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他在英国薩默塞特哈德被列为tailor 。他去世于1635年5月20日在英国薩默塞特哈德享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strong
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English strong(e), strang(e) ‘strong, powerful’ (Old English strang).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish   Stark  .

variants.name: Strang
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German stranc ‘strip of land’, or a habitational name from any of the places so called.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a rope maker, from Middle High German stranc, German Strang ‘cord, rope’.

variants.name: Trehan
meanings: Indian: Sikh name, from a name of a sub-caste of Khatris.

Channel Islands (Jersey): occupational name, a variant of French Trahand, from a derivative of French traire ‘to draw or stretch’, for a silk worker whose job was to draw out the thread from cocoons. In Britain it has sometimes been ‘translated’ into English as Strong .

variants.name: Trahan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Monique, Pierre, Leonce, Lucien, Alcide, Cecile, Emile, Adrien, Camille.

French: variant of Trahant or Trahand (and, in North America, an altered form of the former), a metonymic occupational name for a silkworker who drew out the thread from the cocoons, from a derivative of the verb traire ‘to draw or stretch’. Compare Strong .

History: The LA branches of the Trahan family trace their descent from Guillaume Trahan, from Montreuil-Bellay in Maine-et-Loire, who arrived in Acadia in the 17th century; he married Madeleine Brun in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada), c. 1666. At the time of the expulsion of the Acadians (1755–64), his numerous descendants were deported and finally settled principally in the Attakapas country of LA.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When George Strong was born on 13 February 1556, in Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, John Strong   I, was 37 and his mother, Agnes Whitman, was 37. He married Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond in 1574, in Chard, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. His occupation is listed as tailor  in Chard, Somerset, England. He died on 20 May 1635, in Chard, Somerset, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Strong est né le 13 février 1556, à Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, John Strong   I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes Whitman, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond en 1574, à Chard, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est tailor  à Chard, Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 20 mai 1635, à Chard, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Strong am 13. Februar 1556 in Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Strong   I 37 und seine Mutter Agnes Whitman 37. Er hat 1574 in Chard, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als tailor  in Chard, Somerset, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Mai 1635 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Chard, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Strong è nato il il 13 febbraio 1556 nel Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, il suo padre, John Strong   I, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Whitman, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond nel 1574, nel Chard, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come tailor  nel Chard, Somerset, England. Morì il 20 maggio 1635, nel Chard, Somerset, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: George Strongが1556年2月13日にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアケエルナルフォンで生まれた時，父John Strong   Iは37歳，母Agnes Whitmanは37歳であった。1574年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャードでElizabeth Mary Ann Bondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。イギリスソメルセトチャードでの職業はtailor と記録されている。彼は1635年5月20日にイギリスソメルセトチャードで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Strong(이)가 1556년 2월 13일 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 카이른아르폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Strong   I(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Whitman(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1574년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 처드에서 Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트 처드에서 tailor 이었다. 그는 1635년 5월 20일 영국 서머세트 처드에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Strong nasceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1556, em Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, John Strong   I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Whitman, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond em 1574, em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como tailor  em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 20 de maio de 1635, em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Strong родился 13 февраля 1556 г. в местности каирнарфон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени John Strong   I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Whitman, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond в 1574 г. в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей.  Он работал по профессии tailor  в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия. Он умер 20 мая 1635 г. в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

Se casó con Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond en 1574, en Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era tailor  en Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1635, en Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
